# Front loading the MF Fetch step in application

: Saksham Srivastava
Created time: January 7, 2025 12:50 PM
Status: Not started
Last edited: January 8, 2025 9:00 PM

# **What problem are we solving?**

Our current application conversion stand at ~14%, while the industry standard for conversion is closure to 70%. We have a lot of ground to cover in our conversion percentage. 

---

# **How do we measure success?**

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

Pros of bringing the fetch step forward- 

1. Give the Aha! moment to the customer as soon as possible in the journey. 
2. Drop-off that happen due to the PAN verification failure will be reduced as PAN will be verified only for Tata customers and not for DSP customers. 
3. Significantly reduces the number of steps in the application journey for the customer. 
4. Email verification will be removed as well (Except for customers who only do KFin)
5. Increase in number of good quality leads that sales and reach out and convert. 

Risks of 

1. Product education (Currently done on the homepage after customer verifies the PAN) is not done for the customer before we are asking them to fetch. 
2. If communication is not handled properly, customers might feel that fetching their mutual funds will lock their mutual funds right away.

## Meeting notes

Intent building 
- Benefits 
- Talk to customers on why they got mutual funds 
- People are loss averse

Possible approach: MFC login

Can do email and mobile verification at the end

Lead squared concerns in updating the mobile number later 

Register OTP drop-off in MFD channel data

What are the concerns that the user feels before giving each data (Pain points and solutions)

Positioning of taking PAN - Verify/Check eligibility

Write down what are the things that we are going to change, What all can be done. Impact, possible concerns 

Channel wise data for email verification
